queries.answer_first_two_sentences: Similarity can mean: In mathematics: Similarity (geometry), when a shape looks the same as another shape, but has a different size or rotation Matrix similarity, a relation between matrices In computer science: String metric, or string similarity Semantic similarity in computational linguistics In other fields: In psychology, similarity (psychology) In music, musical similarity In chemistry, chemical similarity Related pages Difference Equality (mathematics) Identity (philosophy) Similarity.
